summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations are planned directly by the worker. The shard has no shared canonical; each listed open PR is classified independently, and linked security-sensitive issue #69799 is quarantined for central security handling. Low-signal PR #76479 is classified non-mutatingly because low-signal PR closeout is disabled for this shard.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked issue requires quarantine only; unrelated PR inventory items can still be classified.

Low-signal classification is clear, but the configured run explicitly disables low-signal PR closeout, so this shard keeps the PR as a non-mutating independent inventory item rather than planning a close.
